name: Zappar
description: WebAR ecosystem with ZapWorks Studio, universal AR SDK and Mattercraft low-code tool for building AR experiences in the browser.

seo.title: Zappar — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Zappar: WebAR ecosystem with ZapWorks Studio, universal AR SDK and Mattercraft low-code tool for building AR experiences in the browser.

when_to_use: Building AR experiences for marketing campaigns without 3D expertise
Deploying WebAR product visualization with marker tracking
Creating educational AR content accessible via browser QR scan
Adding AR try-on features to e-commerce sites with ZapWorks SDK

pros: Mature WebAR SDK with wide support
review.verdict: The most practical WebAR stack if you need no-download AR, with realistic limits versus native ARKit.
review.best_for: Marketing and packaging teams launching AR experiences without app installs
review.not_for: Studios needing high-fidelity AR that requires ARKit or ARCore native features
